channel.title: Guitar on mlesniak.com
channel.description: Recent content in Guitar on mlesniak.com

item.title: Go Guitar // Record Sound
item.description: As part of my ongoing project to write a Go program to recognize different guitar chords and get a better understanding of sound processing, a first milestone has been reached: recording a raw sound sample in Go. In this article I’ll walk through the source code to record sounds using a wrapper for PortAudio and visualize the recorded sample in gnuplot. The whole source code for this blog post can be found in the corresponding GitHub repository.
